subject: WM-0161 review: verified
body: No blocking findings. Verified PR-0 roadmap preserves M0-M8 as historical evidence, hard-gates PR-1..PR-7 on integrated GameSession, real input, continuous 30 TPS, perceptible NPCs, general building, authoritative save/load and 30-minute observed play, keeps WM-0154 blocked and WM-0155/0156 plus WM-0162 non-executing, and preserves Web demo-only, Windows controlled-test and Owner gates. validate/status/handoff/diff/quality pass.
